Record Class PowerSourceInfo

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware.PowerSourceInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
OSHardwareObject
public record PowerSourceInfo(String name, Manufacturer manufacturer, String chemistry, double remainingCapacityPercent, double timeRemainingEstimated, boolean charging, boolean discharging, boolean powerOnLine) extends Record implements OSHardwareObject
Value object representing a power source/battery.

    Description

    isCalculatingTimeRemaining()
    True if the time remaining estimate is still being calculated.
    boolean
    isCriticallyLow()
    True if this battery is critically low (below 10%).
    boolean
    isFullyCharged()
    True if this battery is fully charged (>= 99%).
    boolean

    True if this battery is low (below 20%).

  • Constructor Details

    • PowerSourceInfo

      public PowerSourceInfo(String name, Manufacturer manufacturer, String chemistry, double remainingCapacityPercent, double timeRemainingEstimated, boolean charging, boolean discharging, boolean powerOnLine)
      Creates an instance of a PowerSourceInfo record class.
      Parameters:
      name - the value for the name record component
      manufacturer - the value for the manufacturer record component
      chemistry - the value for the chemistry record component
      remainingCapacityPercent - the value for the remainingCapacityPercent record component
      timeRemainingEstimated - the value for the timeRemainingEstimated record component
      charging - the value for the charging record component
      discharging - the value for the discharging record component
      powerOnLine - the value for the powerOnLine record component

  • Method Details

    • remainingFormatted

      public String remainingFormatted()

    • isCriticallyLow

      public boolean isCriticallyLow()
      True if this battery is critically low (below 10%).

    • isLow

      public boolean isLow()
      True if this battery is low (below 20%).

    • isFullyCharged

      public boolean isFullyCharged()
      True if this battery is fully charged (>= 99%).

    • isCalculatingTimeRemaining

      public boolean isCalculatingTimeRemaining()
      True if the time remaining estimate is still being calculated.

    • timeRemainingFormatted

      public String timeRemainingFormatted()

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
